body: Looking into this now — the MICE package version in renv.lock needs to match production. Will push a fix this afternoon.
Using survminer::ggsurvplot with conf.int=TRUE. Should be straightforward — will open a PR today.
Template is ready for review. Added YAML header with standard fields and a sample code chunk for the data import section.
Checked enrollment records — students 14, 22, and 31 were absent both weeks. I'll add NA entries with an absent flag so the dataset is complete.
Root cause confirmed: the theme_clinical() helper was setting base_size=10 for forest plots and the scatter helper was defaulting to 12. Fixing in a single theme object now.
README draft is up in the docs/ folder. Covers design, inclusion criteria, variable codebook, and a quick-start for reproducing figures.
